Personal Weather Station.

*** 2 INJ *** An RV Park suffered the worst damage, with 12 RV`s either damaged or completely destroyed. There were two injuries here. One additional RV was flipped near Magnolia Beach. There was also some sporadic tree damage and a couple power poles were significantly leaning. Additionally, one house lost a number of shingles.

Storm Survey confirmed EF-1 tornado with max winds of 105 mph began just north of Port Lavaca and continued SE. Damage to several structures as well as widespread tree damage was noted. Some trees uprooted.
*** 2 INJ *** EM confirms at least 9 RVs flipped with two confirmed injuries. Time estimated from radar and surrounding observations.

Two boats were capsized just offshore. An RV and shed were completely destroyed along State Highway 316. A home along Brighton Ave lost a few shingles and farther south along Comal St, a power pole was snapped in half and others were damaged to a lesser extent. All damage over land was strewn to the southeast, consistent with straight-line winds.
